subcodes.first_line: In this world of being there is a phenomenon which We have referred to in some Tablets as the 'Most Great Elixir'.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در وجود آیتی است که ما در اکثر الواح آنرا باکسیر اعظم تعبیر فرموده اسم این آیت در هر نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @power of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
